summary: Seongdong's 중구·성동 을 went DPK narrowly: 박성준 51.96% vs 지상욱 (UFP) 47.27%. Seongsu gentrification was earlier-stage than 2024; the close margin presaged later real-estate-politics tension.

issues.label: Early Seongsu gentrification
issues.description: Seongsu's tech-creative cluster development was nascent in 2020; impact already visible in narrow margin.

issues.label: Residential mix
issues.description: Mixed residential character before gentrification accelerated.

issues.label: Pro-Moon wave (narrow)
issues.description: Narrow margin even with national tailwind suggests structural conservative lean within Seongdong.
